applies_when: Q-SPOUSE-01 == YES OR Q-CHILD-U18-01 == YES OR Q-PEN-EMP-01 == YES OR Q-PEN-01 == YES
not_applicable_when: Q-SPOUSE-01 == NO AND Q-CHILD-U18-01 == NO AND Q-PEN-EMP-01 == NO AND Q-PEN-01 == NO
Q-FIN-01 == NONE OR (answered_non_unknown(Q-FIN-01) AND Q-FIN-01 does_not_contain BANK)
Q-FIN-01 == NONE OR (answered_non_unknown(Q-FIN-01) AND Q-FIN-01 does_not_contain SECURITIES)
Q-INS-01 == NONE OR (answered_non_unknown(Q-INS-01) AND Q-INS-01 does_not_contain_any [LIFE;MEDICAL;COOP])
Q-DIG-01 == NONE OR (answered_non_unknown(Q-DIG-01) AND Q-DIG-01 does_not_contain_any [MOBILE;SUBSCRIPTIONS;ACCOUNTS])
Q-FIN-01 == NONE OR (answered_non_unknown(Q-FIN-01) AND Q-FIN-01 does_not_contain CARD)
Q-CHILD-U18-01 == NO OR (answered_non_unknown(Q-REL-01) AND Q-REL-01 != SPOUSE)
Q-FIN-01 == NONE OR (answered_non_unknown(Q-FIN-01) AND Q-FIN-01 does_not_contain BANK)
